changes.summary: BC-11 AcceptTeamInvitationUseCase with execute() for accept flow: load pending invitation for target, membership check, addUserToTeam, resolve pending join, status update, inviter notification. Exports createAcceptTeamInvitationUseCase factory and TeamInvitationTargetAction type.

Extracted P-8 loadPendingInvitationForTarget helper (shared by accept use case via injected callback and rejectInvitation). TeamInvitationService.acceptInvitation delegates to AcceptTeamInvitationUseCase.

notes: Attempt 1 confirms attempt-0 implementation (tsc/lint/static passed; prior LLM partial was infra-only). AcceptTeamInvitationUseCase not registered in _bootstrap.ts (outside write_set). users.router still calls TeamInvitationService.acceptInvitation which forwards to the use case.
